workflowDescription: End-of-shift handoff between day and night nursing staff. Includes patient status updates, medication reconciliation, pending lab results, and family communication notes. Must comply with HIPAA and hospital documentation standards.
rolesInvolved: Day RN, Night RN, Charge Nurse, Unit Secretary, Attending Physician
toolsUsed: Epic EHR, Vocera Communication, Whiteboard, Paper Checklist
whereItGetsStuck: Charting is often incomplete at shift change. Critical medication changes are communicated verbally but not documented. Night RN discovers missing information 2 hours into shift when patient needs attention.
desiredOutcome: 100% charting completion before shift handoff, structured SBAR handoff for every patient, and zero missed medication reconciliations.
